text: Artificial intelligence has the potential to greatly improve our lives, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias – AI systems can reflect the prejudices in the data they learn from, leading to unfair treatment of certain groups. Fairness means ensuring that these technologies treat everyone equally. Privacy is another key issue, as AI often collects large amounts of personal data that could be misused. To build trust, companies need transparency, explaining clearly how their AI works and makes decisions. Ultimately, responsible AI development involves addressing these challenges, balancing innovation with the protection of human rights and societal well-being.
